rulings.Case Title: CHI CHI BEIGNET INC DOING BUSINESS AS BISCUITS VS. SAEED KHAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Depositions And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 8, 2021 line 1. PLAINTIFF CHI CHI BEIGNET INC DOING BUSINESS AS BISCUITS Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Depositions And For Sanctions is GRANTED. Camara deposition to proceed at 9:30 a.m. on September 9, 2021 in San Francisco and Snider to 9:30 a.m. in San Diego on September 10, 2021. Depositions to either proceed remotely or in person. Parties to meet and confer on this issue and inform the Court if an agreement was reached. If agreement is not reached as of 9:30 a.m. on September 8, 2021 the Court will make a determination as to the manner of the deposition at the time of the hearing. Sanctions granted as requested and stayed pending compliance with this Court's deposition order. If depositions proceed as ordered, the part of the order granting sanctions shall be vacated. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.
